impactStats.label: faster page loads on critical user flows

experiences.summary: Maintaining and extending production AI-powered trading systems with strong performance, reliability, and real-time delivery requirements.

experiences.summary: Built performance-focused full-stack features, real-time interfaces, and production improvements across React, Node.js, and cloud-connected workflows.

experiences.summary: Delivered a full e-commerce platform from design files to secure backend flows, with a strong emphasis on responsiveness and API speed.
